summary.zh: 影游工坊工作台,作者向的互动影游(FMV)编辑器与运行时。作者把提示词、视频、镜头、台词、QTE 与剧情分支拼成可玩的互动影片:用 Opus / Gemini 锻造画面提示词、GPT-Image 出占位关键帧、Seedance 生成视频。编辑期数据 100% 可序列化为 Scenario JSON,运行期是确定性回放,由限时点按(QTE)与选项分支驱动,产出可分发的剧本 + 试玩运行时。
summary.en: The Reel Studio workbench — an author-facing interactive FMV editor and player. Authors assemble prompts, video, shots, dialogue, QTE and branch trees into a playable interactive movie: Opus / Gemini forge画面 prompts, GPT-Image makes placeholder keyframes, Seedance generates video. Editor-time data is 100% serializable to a Scenario JSON; runtime is deterministic playback driven by timed taps (QTE) and choice branches, producing a distributable scenario + playable runtime.

body.zh: 提示词 / 视频 / 镜头 / 台词 / QTE / 剧情分支
body.en: prompts / video / shots / dialogue / QTE / branch tree

title.zh: 编辑期 vs 运行期

body.zh:
编辑期 → 可序列化 Scenario JSON
运行期 → 确定性回放(限时点按 + 选项分支)
body.en:
Editor → serializable Scenario JSON
Runtime → deterministic playback (timed taps + choices)

body.zh: 面板管理启用 → 打开「reel」面板或对话 /reel
body.en: Enable in Admin → open 'reel' or type /reel

notes.zh: 首版:互动影游编辑器 + 运行时
notes.en: First release: interactive FMV editor + runtime
